what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links a design-source channel entry to an image asset identified by image://design-source/vt-gatehouse/p-1.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
target is an image:// URI pointing to design-source/vt-gatehouse/p-1
includes an added timestamp and an id matching the filename
standouts: References a specific image asset (vt-gatehouse/p-1) under the design-source channel
Serves as a lightweight ledger record for an attachment
conventions: Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added
Target uses a custom image:// URI scheme
concerns: Target URI cannot be resolved or validated from this file alone
No caption, alt text, or description of the image is provided
notes: A metadata attachment that ties a design-source channel record to the image asset vt-gatehouse/p-1.
questions: What does the image vt-gatehouse/p-1 depict?
How is this attachment rendered or consumed by the channel system?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as an images attachment matches the content: it records an image target and metadata.
intention_signals: It appears to catalog image assets associated with a design-source channel entry so they can be retrieved or rendered alongside channel memory.
novelty: Uses an image:// URI scheme to reference an asset location.
contribution: Provides a machine-readable attachment record that maps a channel entry to a specific image asset, preserving the asset location and the time it was added.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record linking the design-source channel to the image asset image://design-source/vt-gatehouse/p-1.
intention_for_embedding: To record and expose an image attachment associated with a design-source channel entry.
